name: Cheesy Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Velveeta cheese, shredded or diced
recipeInstructions:
1. For the sauce, melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Stir in the flour, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Gradually add the milk all at once, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Cook and stir until the mixture thickens and becomes bubbly.
5. Stir in the Velveeta cheese until melted and smooth.
6. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
7. Place half of the sliced potatoes in a greased 1-quart casserole dish.
8. Cover with half of the sauce.
9. Repeat layers with the remaining potatoes and sauce.
10. Sprinkle the cheddar cheese evenly over the top.
11. Cover the dish with aluminum foil.
12. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35 minutes.
13. Remove the foil and continue baking uncovered for an additional 30 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
14. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
